skipped_checks.reason: The local Claude CLI was not authenticated, so the leaf smoke ended before a successful model/tool turn and produced no direct hook log evidence.
skipped_checks.reproduction: Run claude /login, then run: timeout 45 claude -p --output-format json "Use Bash to run: printf HOOK_TEST_COMPLETE". Confirm a matching leaf-session PreToolUse and PostToolUse hook log/audit entry.

skipped_checks.reason: The initial red-only commit attempt failed with an index.lock permission error before production code was added. The final implementation commit succeeded after the run artifacts were force-added.
skipped_checks.reproduction: The failed command is recorded as red_commit_attempt.
